products.name: Dragon Ball Z Plush Figure Puar 22 cm
products.description:
'Let's kick booty!'

Puar has ditched Yamcha to become Youtooz's best friend! Making their debut and standing at 9 inches tall with long pointed ears, their pale blue tufted oval head contains a gleeful smile with small cheery eyes as their long whiskers hang down to either side. With little paws held close in front of their chest, creme markings cover their face, ears, belly and the tip of the long tails that curls to their front. This plush is packed to the seams with 100% PP cotton and is made of normal minky and felt materials, absolutely perfect for cuddling or being the perfect cheerleader to your battle!

About Dragon Ball Z

Dragon Ball Z is the Japanese anime based on the manga Dragon Ball written and illustrated by Akira Toriyama. It follows the story of Son Goku and his companions as they defend the Earth (and Universe) from numerous evils with each being worse than the last! All while striving to be the strongest around no matter who, or what, sees them as an obstacle in their path!

products.name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Son Gohan Beast 15 cm

From "Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero," SON GOHAN BEAST joins S.H.Figuarts! It perfectly captures his voluminous hairstyle and shredded clothing. Optional expression parts let you re-create his defiant attitude against Cell Max, and numerous optional hands let you pose him either gathering ki or releasing powerful beam-cannon attacks against his foes. It even includes special effect parts for the beam attack, letting you re-live all the onscreen excitement! As a bonus, an optional face for the S.H.Figuarts Ultimate GOHAN SUPER HERO figure (sold separately) is included, letting you re-create the moments before SON GOHAN goes beast mode!

Set Contents Main Body, Three optional expressions, Three left and four right optional hands, Beam attack effect part set, Crossed arm parts

BONUS S.H.Figuarts Ultimate GOHAN SUPER HERO optional expression

products.name: Dragon Ball Super Mega Premium Masterline Statue 1/4 Golden Frieza 61 cm
products.description: Prime 1 Studio and MegaHouse are very proud to collaborate for this long-awaited entry to our Premium Masterline Series, one of the most iconic antagonists from Dragon Ball Super: 1:4 scale MPMDBZ-04 Golden Frieza! Emperor of a powerful and fearsome race known as the Frost Demons, or Frieza's Race, he possesses an insatiable desire for control and domination, seeking to conquer planets and exploit their resources. He has built quite a reputation for himself throughout the universe for his cruelty, ruthlessness, and immense power. This has led him to destroy Planet Vegeta, Goku and Vegeta's home planet, over the fear of the Saiyan race's growing power and their potential to become a threat to his rule. Following his defeat on Namek at the hands of Super Saiyan Goku, Frieza was rescued by his father. His body was reconstructed with cybernetic enhancements, but he remained unsatisfied with his current state and desired more power and strength. He underwent intense mental and physical training, pushing his limits to new heights. Through sheer determination, he tapped into a new transformation known as "Golden Frieza". Striking his signature Frieza Stance, one foot in from of the other, hands outstretched, he is showing off his significant changes. His body has now become sleek and smooth with a golden metallic skin tone. His muscles are more defined as he gains a heightened aura of power. His energy output greatly surpasses any of his previous forms, taking a golden hue that is LED-illuminated. For the cherry on top, a Dragon Ball Super logo stand for display also comes with this piece. A must-have for Dragon Ball fans everywhere! Specifications: - Statue Size Approximately 24 inches (H: 61cm W: 43cm D: 34cm) - Dragon Ball Super inspired base - LED illiminated effect parts - One (1) Dragon Ball Super logo stand Please note: Due to the size of this item, additional shipping costs may apply. Apart from your location, the actual package size and weight is needed to determine those costs. Both are unknown at this point and may not be available until the product arrives in our warehouse.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue 1/4 Super Saiyan Vegeta Deluxe Version 64 cm
products.description: Prime 1 Studio is proud to present another collaboration with MegaHouse to bring you the long-awaited prince of the Saiyan Race, 1/4 Scale MPMDBZ-02DX Super Saiyan Vegeta Deluxe Version from Dragon Ball Z!!! Vegeta is from Planet Vegeta, home of the elite warriors of the proud Saiyan race. He is the true eternal rival of Son Goku and only lives to become stronger and defeat his enemies. Regardless of whatever allies he may make on the way, Vegeta is a proud warrior that stays true to himself. Through the spirit of seeking power, dedicated training, and true determination, Vegeta is a Super Saiyan! MegaHouse has collaborated with Prime 1 Studio's exquisite 3D modeling to bring to life one of the most iconic moments in DBZ history. We have captured Vegeta as he is charging his Big Bank Attack! Complete with LED illumination and swappable Lightning and stone effects around the statue, this one-of-a-kind masterpiece will pop out in any collection. The deluxe version will feature 3 alternate Vegeta portraits so you can enjoy Vegeta showing his pride! Pair with the MPMDBZ-DX Super Saiyan Goku Deluxe Version to have the ultimate Saiyan display! A must have for DBZ fans everywhere! Product Specifications: - Statue Size approx. 25 inches tall with Big Bang Attack [H:64.7cm W:45.1cm D:39.6cm] - Statue Size approx. without Big Bang Attack [H:64.7cm W:45.1cm D:48.7cm] - LED Illumination effect on Base and Big Bang Attack - One (1) Dragon Ball Z designed theme base - One (1) Set of Special Effect Parts for Display around Base - Four (4) Alternate Portraits (Base Form, Straight Face, Smile, Smirk) - Two (2) Swappable effect parts (Lightning Effect, Stone Parts) Please note: Due to the size of this item, additional shipping costs may apply. Apart from your location, the actual package size and weight is needed to determine those costs. Both are unknown at this point and may not be available until the product arrives in our warehouse.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue 1/4 Super Saiyan Son Goku Deluxe Version 64 cm
products.description: Prime 1 Studio and MegaHouse are proud to collaborate to make a long-awaited statue of the main protagonist Son Goku from Dragon Ball Z! We chose his popular Super Saiyan look in a dynamic Kamehameha Pose with an LED Light-up function which gives some vigor to the whole statue. We also added some small highly detailed parts to the base and the whole body that gives an amazing effect of a fierce battle. The Deluxe Version comes with a total of four portraits - Normal, Super Saiyan 1, Super Saiyan 2 and Super Saiyan 3. Some additional lighting effects are added while display with SSJ2 and SSJ3 portraits. Product Specifications: - Size approximately 64 x 48 x 47 cm - One (1) Set of Special Effect Parts for Display - One (1) designed theme base with LED Light-up function - LED Light-up function Kamehameha Charging Effect - Four (4) Portraits (Normal, Super Saiyan 1, Super Saiyan 2, Super Saiyan 3) - Lighting effect parts to display with SSJ2 and SSJ3 portraits Limited Edition. products.name: Gravion Moderoid Plastic Model Kit God Gravion 17 cm
products.description:
"Fellows of the Gran Knights, combine in MODEROID form!"

From the anime series "Gravion" comes a plastic model of the fang that crushes evil, God Gravion!
The Gran Kaiser, G Shadow, G Driller, G Striker and G Attacker can be combined into God Gravion with the use of interchangeable parts. The core Gran Kaiser is fully articulated and even comes with the Gran Magnum as a bonus part! A non-transformable body part for displaying God Gravion in combined form is included in order to make the model easier to move and display. A Graviton Sword, two Graviton Rifles and interchangeable hand parts are all included. The various parts of the mecha have been separated into various colored runners and pre-painted parts, and the model kit also comes with stickers, making it easy to recreate the mecha from the series with a simple assembly.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue 1/4 Super Saiyan Vegeta 64 cm
products.description:
Prime 1 Studio is proud to present another collaboration with MegaHouse to bring you the long-awaited prince of the Saiyan Race, 1/4 Scale MPMDBZ-02 Super Saiyan Vegeta from Dragon Ball Z!!!

Vegeta is from Planet Vegeta, home of the elite warriors of the proud Saiyan race. He is the true eternal rival of Son Goku and only lives to become stronger and defeat his enemies. Regardless of whatever allies he may make on the way, Vegeta is a proud warrior that stays true to himself. Through the spirit of seeking power, dedicated training, and true determination, Vegeta is a Super Saiyan!

MegaHouse has collaborated with Prime 1 Studio's exquisite 3D modeling to bring to life one of the most iconic moments in DBZ history. We have captured Vegeta as he is charging his Big Bank Attack! Complete with LED illumination and swappable lightning and stone effects around the statue, this one-of-a-kind masterpiece will pop out in any collection. Pair with the MPMDBZ-02 Super Saiyan Goku to have the ultimate Saiyan display! A must have for DBZ fans everywhere!

Product Specifications:

- Statue Size approx. 25 inches tall with Big Bang Attack [H:64.7cm W:45.1cm D:39.6cm]
- Statue Size approx. without Big Bang Attack [H:64.7cm W:45.1cm D:48.7cm]
- LED Illumination effect on Base and Big Bang Attack
- One (1) Dragon Ball Z designed theme base
- One (1) Set of Special Effect Parts for Display around Base
- Two (2) Swappable effect parts (Lightning Effect, Stone Parts)
